textByHash.042994e1c212bc4560465b5c30cbc3cc80717b82: Kill me, eh? You shall be crushed. Guards!
textByHash.129e9d261239e02847b20526ea569bce906dad6e: Grrr, why do I bother? It's a good job I got another part.
textByHash.1a65cd853b3390604d51c0a100f021b63725a0b1: Here is a key to the chest it's in. If you bring it here, I may reward you...
textByHash.4cd7051417d1b19b7c1d7de7d4920aa1ca508544: No, I have no more tasks for you, now go away.
textByHash.7c60297798f548d6f90dcc51d3340bbd293fd6e1: Where my gold from dat dirty Toban?
textByHash.842539c790a0c912b4e177ae74f093dbcf838f55: South-east of here der is more ogres - the name of the chieftain is Toban. He stole gold from me and I want it back!
textByHash.9913ea02eb36cfc8ba6443e8453e9c01661ac415: Just a minute... Maybe if you did somet'ing for me, I might help you get in.
textByHash.a5ab9bf7988a4640f97872d477669216f19f2289: No you don't! If you want to impress me, get da gold I asked for!
textByHash.ab232b9c6eccd01a974b6995cd8bf8eb94df4a05: Don't come back until you have it, unless you wanna be on tonight's menu!
textByHash.bfcc2ec60398d7efcb309348040af5236a6007e7: Are you trying to trick me? I bet you got it stored somewhere. Humans always do that.
textByHash.c539d26903fad769b81028000d991374cac702a9: Well, well, the little t'ing has got it! Take dis to show little t'ing is a friend to da ogres. [laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh]!
textByHash.d5f8024b7a02b1e2d07f5ab58eeb8753f2e1af27: Are you blind? I can see you got it even from here!
textByHash.ff3715a4203475ece2fd4d9bf974de94d9c4741c: Stoopid! Take another and don't lose it!
